name: Coeurs a La Creme with Fresh Raspberry Coulis
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the raspberry coulis: In a small bowl, blend 10 fresh raspberries and ½ cup caster sugar until smooth. Stir in the juice of half a lemon.
2. For each heart-shaped dessert, beat the egg whites just until stiff peaks form.
3. Sift 2 tablespoons of caster sugar over the beaten egg whites and gently fold into the mixture to combine.
4. Spoon the cheese (curd or cream cheese) into six prepared molds, tapping gently to release air bubbles.
5. Fold the ends of damp muslin or cheesecloth over each mold, then refrigerate overnight to set.
6. To serve, carefully unmold the desserts and place them on plates topped with a small dollop of raspberry coulis.
7. Drizzle each serving with 5 fluid ounces of heavy cream before presenting.
